Coding Agents

Context Engineering for AI Agents
shinpr/ai-coding-project-boilerplate: Production-ready TypeScript boilerplate for Claude Code with specialized AI agents
omergulcicek/nizam: A production-ready Next.js 16 boilerplate designed for scalability, performance, and developer happiness.
nibzard/awesome-agentic-patterns: A curated catalogue of awesome agentic AI patterns
vibeforge1111/vibeship-spawner-skills: a skill directory for world-class specialized agents, in your terminal / IDE. more sophisticated than skills with just md files. and they're free.
github/awesome-copilot: Community-contributed instructions, prompts, and configurations to help you make the most of GitHub Copilot.
ixartz/SaaS-Boilerplate: 🚀🎉📚 SaaS Boilerplate built with Next.js + Tailwind CSS + Shadcn UI + TypeScript. ⚡️ Full-stack React application with Auth, Multi-tenancy, Roles & Permissions, i18n, Landing Page, DB, Logging, Testing

tencent-ailab/IP-Adapter: The image prompt adapter is designed to enable a pretrained text-to-image diffusion model to generate images with image prompt.

modelscope/facechain: FaceChain is a deep-learning toolchain for generating your Digital-Twin.

Tools | Artificial Studio
Create - Artbreeder
PixNova AI: All-in-One AI Image & Video Generator Platform
calesthio/OpenMontage: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.

suno-ai/bark: 🔊 Text-Prompted Generative Audio Model
Torantulino/Auto-GPT: An experimental open-source attempt to make GPT-4 fully autonomous.
haotian-liu/LLaVA: Large Language-and-Vision Assistant built towards multimodal GPT-4 level capabilities.
Issues · nomic-ai/gpt4all
xtekky/gpt4free: decentralising the Ai Industry, free gpt-4/3.5 scripts through several reverse engineered api's ( poe.com, phind.com, chat.openai.com etc...)
muellerberndt/micro-gpt: A minimal generic autonomous agent based on GPT-3.5 / GPT-4. Can analyze stock prices, perform network security tests, create art, and order pizza.
h2oai/h2o-llmstudio: H2O LLM Studio - a framework and no-code GUI for fine-tuning LLMs
BloopAI/bloop: bloop is a fast code search engine written in Rust.
Josh-XT/Agent-LLM: An Artificial Intelligence Automation Platform. AI Instruction management from various providers, has an adaptive memory, and a versatile plugin system with many commands including web browsing. Supports many AI providers and models and growing support every day.
deep-floyd/IF
ai-collection/ai-collection: The Generative AI Landscape - A Collection of Awesome Generative AI Applications
hwchase17/langchain: ⚡ Building applications with LLMs through composability ⚡
imartinez/privateGPT: Interact privately with your documents using the power of GPT, 100% privately, no data leaks
StanGirard/quivr: Dump all your files and thoughts into your GenerativeAI Second Brain and chat with it
JushBJJ/Mr.-Ranedeer-AI-Tutor: A GPT-4 AI Tutor Prompt for customizable personalized learning experiences.
iperov/DeepFaceLive: Real-time face swap for PC streaming or video calls
pengzhile/pandora: Pandora, a ChatGPT that lets you breathe smoothly. Pandora, a ChatGPT that helps you breathe smoothly.
Vision-CAIR/MiniGPT-4: MiniGPT-4: Enhancing Vision-language Understanding with Advanced Large Language Models
s0md3v/roop: one-click deepfake (face swap)
svc-develop-team/so-vits-svc: SoftVC VITS Singing Voice Conversion
facebookresearch/audiocraft: Audiocraft is a library for audio processing and generation with deep learning. It features the state-of-the-art EnCodec audio compressor / tokenizer, along with MusicGen, a simple and controllable music generation LM with textual and melodic conditioning.
AntonOsika/gpt-engineer: Specify what you want it to build, the AI asks for clarification, and then builds it.
Luodian/Otter: 🦦 Otter, a multi-modal model based on OpenFlamingo (open-sourced version of DeepMind's Flamingo), trained on MIMIC-IT and showcasing improved instruction-following and in-context learning ability.
e2b-dev/e2b: Developer-first AgentOps platform - deploy, test, and monitor AI agents
getcursor/cursor: An editor made for programming with AI 🤖
alibaba/Chat2DB: 🔥 🔥 🔥 An intelligent and versatile general-purpose SQL client and reporting tool for databases which integrates ChatGPT capabilities.(智能的通用数据库SQL客户端和报表工具)
nlpxucan/WizardLM: Family of instruction-following LLMs powered by Evol-Instruct: WizardLM, WizardCoder
h2oai/h2ogpt: Join us at H2O.ai to make the world's best open-source GPT with document and image Q&A, 100% private chat, no data leaks, Apache 2.0 https://arxiv.org/pdf/2306.08161.pdf
open-mmlab/mmagic: OpenMMLab Multimodal Advanced, Generative, and Intelligent Creation Toolbox. Unlock the magic 🪄: Generative-AI (AIGC), easy-to-use APIs, awsome model zoo, diffusion models, for text-to-image generation, image/video restoration/enhancement, etc.
LAION-AI/Open-Assistant: OpenAssistant is a chat-based assistant that understands tasks, can interact with third-party systems, and retrieve information dynamically to do so.
vercel-labs/ai: Build AI-powered applications with React, Svelte, and Vue
ChatPDF - Chat with any PDF!
Search - Consensus - Evidence-Based Answers, Faster
steven-tey/novel: Notion-style WYSIWYG editor with AI-powered autocompletions
tiiuae/falcon-40b · Hugging Face
Open LLM Leaderboard - a Hugging Face Space by HuggingFaceH4
BradyFU/Awesome-Multimodal-Large-Language-Models: Latest Papers and Datasets on Multimodal Large Language Models
binary-husky/gpt_academic: Provides a graphical interface for ChatGPT/GLM, especially optimizes the paper reading experience, modular design supports custom shortcut buttons & function plug-ins, supports code block table display, Tex formula dual display, supports Python and C++, etc. Project analysis & self-translation function, PDF/LaTex paper translation & summary function, support for parallel inquiry of multiple LLM models, support for local models such as Tsinghua chatglm. Compatible with Fudan MOSS, llama, rwkv, Pangu, newbing, claude, etc.
IntelligenzaArtificiale/Free-Auto-GPT: Free Auto GPT with NO paids API is a repository that offers a simple version of Auto GPT, an autonomous AI agent capable of performing tasks independently. Unlike other versions, our implementation does not rely on any paid OpenAI API, making it accessible to anyone.
Stability-AI/generative-models: Generative Models by Stability AI
mindsdb/mindsdb: MindsDB is a Server for Artificial Intelligence Logic. Enabling developers to ship to production AI powered projects (from the latest LLMs, vector operations, state of the art time-series forecasting to Machine Learning) in a fast and scalable way.
Cohere | Building the Future of AI
leon-ai/leon: 🧠 Leon is your open-source personal assistant.
ramonvc/freegpt-webui: GPT 3.5/4 with a Chat Web UI. No API key required.
PromtEngineer/localGPT: Chat with your documents on your local device using GPT models. No data leaves your device and 100% private.
0xpayne/gpt-migrate: Easily migrate your codebase from one framework or language to another.
imoneoi/openchat: OpenChat: Less is More for Open-source Models
Alpaca Eval Leaderboard
geekan/MetaGPT: The Multi-Agent Meta Programming Framework: Given one line Requirement, return PRD, Design, Tasks, Repo | 多智能体元编程框架：给定老板需求，输出产品文档、架构设计、任务列表、代码
smol-ai/developer: with 100k context windows on the way, it's now feasible for every dev to have their own smol developer
sunner/ChatALL: Concurrently chat with ChatGPT, Bing Chat, Bard, Alpaca, Vicuna, Claude, ChatGLM, MOSS, 讯飞星火, 文心一言 and more, discover the best answers
Blog
ChatPaper
Your summary of "The Impact of Communicative Stress" - Any Summary
kyegomez/LongNet: Implementation of plug in and play Attention from "LongNet: Scaling Transformers to 1,000,000,000 Tokens"
mazzzystar/Queryable: Run OpenAI's CLIP model on iPhone to Search Photos.
danswer-ai/danswer: OpenSource Enterprise QA
deepset-ai/haystack: :mag: Haystack is an open source NLP framework to interact with your data using Transformer models and LLMs (GPT-4, ChatGPT and alike). Haystack offers production-ready tools to quickly build complex question answering, semantic search, text generation applications, and more.
a16z-infra/companion-app: AI companions with memory: a lightweight stack to create and host your own AI companions
Mintplex-Labs/anything-llm: A full-stack application that turns any documents into an intelligent chatbot with a sleek UI and easier way to manage your workspaces.
Steamship
openai/whisper: Robust Speech Recognition via Large-Scale Weak Supervision
Shaunwei/RealChar: 🎙️🤖Create, Customize and Talk to your AI Character/Companion in Realtime(All in One Codebase!). Have a natural seamless conversation with AI everywhere(mobile, web and terminal) using LLM OpenAI GPT3.5/4, Anthropic Claude2, Chroma Vector DB, Whisper Speech2Text, ElevenLabs Text2Speech🎙️🤖
a16z-infra/ai-getting-started: A Javascript AI getting started stack for weekend projects, including image/text models, vector stores, auth, and deployment configs
homanp/superagent: 🥷 Superagent - Build, deploy, and manage LLM-powered agents
Claude
go-skynet/LocalAI: :robot: Self-hosted, community-driven, local OpenAI-compatible API. Drop-in replacement for OpenAI running LLMs on consumer-grade hardware. Free Open Source OpenAI alternative. No GPU required. LocalAI is an API to run ggml compatible models: llama, gpt4all, rwkv, whisper, vicuna, koala, gpt4all-j, cerebras, falcon, dolly, starcoder, and many other
Yidadaa/ChatGPT-Next-Web: A well-designed cross-platform ChatGPT UI (Web / PWA / Linux / Win / MacOS). 一键拥有你自己的跨平台 ChatGPT 应用。
oobabooga/text-generation-webui: A gradio web UI for running Large Language Models like LLaMA, llama.cpp, GPT-J, Pythia, OPT, and GALACTICA.
bigscience-workshop/petals: 🌸 Run large language models at home, BitTorrent-style. Fine-tuning and inference up to 10x faster than offloading
facebookresearch/llama-recipes: Examples and recipes for Llama 2 model
invoke-ai/InvokeAI: InvokeAI is a leading creative engine for Stable Diffusion models, empowering professionals, artists, and enthusiasts to generate and create visual media using the latest AI-driven technologies. The solution offers an industry leading WebUI, supports terminal use through a CLI, and serves as the foundation for multiple commercial products.
microsoft/TypeChat: TypeChat is a library that makes it easy to build natural language interfaces using types.
khoj-ai/khoj: An AI personal assistant for your digital brain
3DFY Prompt - Text-to-3D
zilliztech/GPTCache: Semantic cache for LLMs. Fully integrated with LangChain and llama_index.
jamesmurdza/awesome-ai-devtools: Curated list of AI-powered developer tools.

AudioLDM: Text-to-Audio Generation with Latent Diffusion Models - Speech Research
lllyasviel/Fooocus: Focus on prompting and generating
varunshenoy/opendream: An extensible, easy-to-use, and portable diffusion web UI 👨‍🎨
Plachtaa/VALL-E-X: An open source implementation of Microsoft's VALL-E X zero-shot TTS model. Demo is available in https://plachtaa.github.io

OpenBMB/ChatDev: Create Customized Software using Natural Language Idea (through Multi-Agent Collaboration)

Ironclad/rivet: AI agent and prompt chaining IDE and library

FL33TW00D/whisper-turbo: Whisper on the web - turbocharged by your GPU 🏎️
OpenPipe/OpenPipe: Turn expensive prompts into cheap fine-tuned models
CorentinJ/Real-Time-Voice-Cloning: Clone a voice in 5 seconds to generate arbitrary speech in real-time
lobehub/lobe-chat: 🤖 Lobe Chat - an open-source, extensible (Function Calling), high-performance chatbot framework. It supports one-click free deployment of your private ChatGPT/LLM web application.

v0 by Vercel
open-mmlab/Amphion: Amphion (/æmˈfaɪən/) is a toolkit for Audio, Music, and Speech Generation. Its purpose is to support reproducible research and help junior researchers and engineers get started in the field of audio, music, and speech generation research and development.
LouisShark/chatgpt_system_prompt: store all agent's system prompt
cumulo-autumn/StreamDiffusion: StreamDiffusion: A Pipeline-Level Solution for Real-Time Interactive Generation
myshell-ai/OpenVoice: Instant voice cloning by MyShell.

Portkey-AI/gateway: A Blazing Fast AI Gateway. Route to 100+ LLMs with 1 fast & friendly API.
microsoft/autogen: Enable Next-Gen Large Language Model Applications. Join our Discord: https://discord.gg/pAbnFJrkgZ
FujiwaraChoki/MoneyPrinter: Automate Creation of YouTube Shorts using MoviePy.
stitionai/devika: Devika is an Agentic AI Software Engineer that can understand high-level human instructions, break them down into steps, research relevant information, and write code to achieve the given objective. Devika aims to be a competitive open-source alternative to Devin by Cognition AI.
mshumer/gpt-investor
OpenDevin/OpenDevin: 🐚 OpenDevin: Code Less, Make More
langgenius/dify: Dify is an open-source LLM app development platform. Dify's intuitive interface combines AI workflow, RAG pipeline, agent capabilities, model management, observability features and more, letting you quickly go from prototype to production.
plandex-ai/plandex: An AI coding engine for complex tasks
stanford-oval/storm: An LLM-powered knowledge curation system that researches a topic and generates a full-length report with citations.
wandb/openui: OpenUI let's you describe UI using your imagination, then see it rendered live.
Cookup.AI
mendableai/firecrawl: 🔥 Turn entire websites into LLM-ready markdown or structured data. Scrape, crawl and extract with a single API.
DSPy Documentation | DSPy
roboflow/supervision: We write your reusable computer vision tools. 💜
All-Hands-AI/OpenHands: 🙌 OpenHands: Code Less, Make More
Generative AI Scripting | GenAIScript
DS4SD/docling: Get your documents ready for gen AI
cline/cline: Autonomous coding agent right in your IDE, capable of creating/editing files, executing commands, using the browser, and more with your permission every step of the way.
Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps: Collection of awesome LLM apps with RAG using OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini and opensource models.
OpenSPG/KAG: KAG is a logical form-guided reasoning and retrieval framework based on OpenSPG engine and LLMs. It is used to build logical reasoning and factual Q&A solutions for professional domain knowledge bases. It can effectively overcome the shortcomings of the traditional RAG vector similarity calculation model.

NotebookLM
TextFX

Verse by Verse

Scira
camel-ai/camel: 🐫 CAMEL: Finding the Scaling Law of Agents. The first and the best multi-agent framework. https://www.camel-ai.org
joanrod/star-vector: StarVector is a foundation model for SVG generation that transforms vectorization into a code generation task. Using a vision-language modeling architecture, StarVector processes both visual and textual inputs to produce high-quality SVG code with remarkable precision.
CopilotKit/CopilotKit: React UI + elegant infrastructure for AI Copilots, AI chatbots, and in-app AI agents. The Agentic last-mile 🪁

Knowledge Base

labring/FastGPT: FastGPT is a knowledge-based platform built on the LLMs, offers a comprehensive suite of out-of-the-box capabilities such as data processing, RAG retrieval, and visual AI workflow orchestration, letting you easily develop and deploy complex question-answering systems without the need for extensive setup or configuration.
infiniflow/ragflow: RAGFlow is an open-source RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) engine based on deep document understanding.
Casibase | Casibase · Open-Source LangChain-like AI Knowledge Database & Chat Bot with Admin UI and multi-model support (ChatGPT, Claude, Llama 3, DeepSeek R1, HuggingFace, etc.)

continuedev/continue: ⏩ Create, share, and use custom AI code assistants with our open-source IDE extensions and hub of models, rules, prompts, docs, and other building blocks
InternLM/MindSearch: 🔍 An LLM-based Multi-agent Framework of Web Search Engine (like Perplexity.ai Pro and SearchGPT)
Fosowl/agenticSeek: Fully Local Manus AI. No APIs, No $200 monthly bills. Enjoy an autonomous agent that thinks, browses the web, and code for the sole cost of electricity.
Chat | Google AI Studio
daytonaio/daytona: Daytona is a Secure and Elastic Infrastructure for Running AI-Generated Code
getzep/graphiti: Build Real-Time Knowledge Graphs for AI Agents
kortix-ai/suna: Suna - Open Source Generalist AI Agent
coleam00/Archon: Beta release of Archon OS - the knowledge and task management backbone for AI coding assistants.
moeru-ai/airi: 💖🧸 Self hosted, you owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.

GrapesJS - Free and Open Source Web Template Editor Framework
supermemoryai/supermemory: Memory engine and app that is extremely fast, scalable. The Memory API for the AI era.
Skyvern-AI/skyvern: Automate browser based workflows with AI

Smithery - Turn scattered context into skills for AI
wshobson/agents: Intelligent automation and multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code

letta-ai/letta: Letta is the platform for building stateful agents: open AI with advanced memory that can learn and self-improve over time.
exo-explore/exo: Run your own AI cluster at home with everyday devices 📱💻 🖥️⌚
apurvsinghgautam/robin: AI-Powered Dark Web OSINT Tool
yichuan-w/LEANN: RAG on Everything with LEANN. Enjoy 97% storage savings while running a fast, accurate, and 100% private RAG application on your personal device.
BloopAI/vibe-kanban: Get 10X more out of Claude Code, Codex or any coding agent
krazyjakee/AGENTS.db: AGENTS.db is AGENTS.md on steroids. A file format and toolkit for deterministic context.
vibeship-spawner-skills/frontend/frontend/patterns.md at main · vibeforge1111/vibeship-spawner-skills
github/spec-kit: 💫 Toolkit to help you get started with Spec-Driven Development
MrLesk/Backlog.md: Backlog.md - A tool for managing project collaboration between humans and AI Agents in a git ecosystem
Prompts | prompts.chat
Overview - Agent Skills
MiroMindAI/MiroThinker: MiroThinker is a series of open-source search agent designed to advance tool-augmented reasoning and information-seeking capabilities.
memvid/memvid: Memory layer for AI Agents. Replace complex RAG pipelines with a serverless, single-file memory layer. Give your agents instant retrieval and long-term memory.
ChromeDevTools/chrome-devtools-mcp: Chrome DevTools for coding agents
thedotmack/claude-mem: A Claude Code plugin that automatically captures everything Claude does during your coding sessions, compresses it with AI (using Claude's agent-sdk), and injects relevant context back into future sessions.
OpenBMB/UltraRAG: UltraRAG v3: A Low-Code MCP Framework for Building Complex and Innovative RAG Pipelines
badlogic/pi-mono: AI agent toolkit: coding agent CLI, unified LLM API, TUI & web UI libraries, Slack bot, vLLM pods
VectifyAI/PageIndex: 📑 PageIndex: Document Index for Vectorless, Reasoning-based RAG
mastra-ai/mastra: From the team behind Gatsby, Mastra is a framework for building AI-powered applications and agents with a modern TypeScript stack.
block/goose: an open source, extensible AI agent that goes beyond code suggestions - install, execute, edit, and test with any LLM
iOfficeAI/AionUi: Free, local, open-source 24/7 Cowork and Clawdbot for Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Qwen Code, Goose CLI, Auggie, and more | 🌟 Star if you like it!
microsoft/agent-lightning: The absolute trainer to light up AI agents.
openclaw/openclaw: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
amantus-ai/vibetunnel: Turn any browser into your terminal & command your agents on the go.
pedramamini/Maestro: Agent Orchestration Command Center
The Agent Skills Directory
vm0-ai/vm0: the easiest way to run natural language-described workflows automatically
obra/superpowers: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
masoncl/review-prompts: AI review prompts
topoteretes/cognee: Memory for AI Agents in 6 lines of code
bytedance/UI-TARS-desktop: The Open-Source Multimodal AI Agent Stack: Connecting Cutting-Edge AI Models and Agent Infra
KeygraphHQ/shannon: Fully autonomous AI hacker to find actual exploits in your web apps. Shannon has achieved a 96.15% success rate on the hint-free, source-aware XBOW Benchmark.
OpenBMB/MiniCPM-o: A Gemini 2.5 Flash Level MLLM for Vision, Speech, and Full-Duplex Multimodal Live Streaming on Your Phone
google/langextract: A Python library for extracting structured information from unstructured text using LLMs with precise source grounding and interactive visualization.
danielmiessler/Personal_AI_Infrastructure: Agentic AI Infrastructure for magnifying HUMAN capabilities.
THUDM/slime: slime is an LLM post-training framework for RL Scaling.
p-e-w/heretic: Fully automatic censorship removal for language models
davila7/claude-code-templates: CLI tool for configuring and monitoring Claude Code
alibaba/zvec: A lightweight, lightning-fast, in-process vector database
Composio - Skills that evolve with your Agents
abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus: GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration
vxcontrol/pentagi: ✨ Fully autonomous AI Agents system capable of performing complex penetration testing tasks
volcengine/OpenViking: OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.
InsForge/InsForge: Give agents everything they need to ship fullstack apps. The backend built for agentic development.
msitarzewski/agency-agents: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
jarrodwatts/claude-hud: A Claude Code plugin that shows what's happening - context usage, active tools, running agents, and todo progress
vas3k/TaxHacker: Self-hosted AI accounting app. LLM analyzer for receipts, invoices, transactions with custom prompts and categories
TauricResearch/TradingAgents: TradingAgents: Multi-Agents LLM Financial Trading Framework
bytedance/deer-flow: An open-source SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.
Crosstalk-Solutions/project-nomad: Project N.O.M.A.D, is a self-contained, offline survival computer packed with critical tools, knowledge, and AI to keep you informed and empowered—anytime, anywhere.
ruvnet/ruflo: 🌊 The leading agent orchestration platform for Claude. Deploy intelligent multi-agent swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems. Features enterprise-grade architecture, distributed swarm intelligence, RAG integration, and native Claude Code / Codex Integration
NousResearch/hermes-agent: The agent that grows with you
letta-ai/claude-subconscious: Give Claude Code a subconscious
letta-ai/letta-code: The memory-first coding agent
SakanaAI/AI-Scientist-v2: The AI Scientist-v2: Workshop-Level Automated Scientific Discovery via Agentic Tree Search
onyx-dot-app/onyx: Open Source AI Platform - AI Chat with advanced features that works with every LLM
agentscope-ai/agentscope: Build and run agents you can see, understand and trust.
datalab-to/chandra: OCR model that handles complex tables, forms, handwriting with full layout.
microsoft/VibeVoice: Open-Source Frontier Voice AI
Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode: Teams-first Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code
666ghj/MiroFish: A Simple and Universal Swarm Intelligence Engine, Predicting Anything. 简洁通用的群体智能引擎，预测万物
mattpocock/skills: My personal directory of skills, straight from my .claude directory.
affaan-m/everything-claude-code: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
Fission-AI/OpenSpec: Spec-driven development (SDD) for AI coding assistants.
pbakaus/impeccable: The design language that makes your AI harness better at design.
andrewyng/context-hub
google-ai-edge/gallery: A gallery that showcases on-device ML/GenAI use cases and allows people to try and use models locally.
forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
snarktank/ralph: Ralph is an autonomous AI agent loop that runs repeatedly until all PRD items are complete.
multica-ai/multica: The open-source managed agents platform. Turn coding agents into real teammates — assign tasks, track progress, compound skills.
shanraisshan/claude-code-best-practice: from vibe coding to agentic engineering - practice makes claude perfect
paperclipai/paperclip: Open-source orchestration for zero-human companies
YishenTu/claudian: An Obsidian plugin that embeds Claude Code as an AI collaborator in your vault
OpenBMB/VoxCPM: VoxCPM2: Tokenizer-Free TTS for Multilingual Speech Generation, Creative Voice Design, and True-to-Life Cloning
HKUDS/DeepTutor: "DeepTutor: Agent-Native Personalized Learning Assistant"
Donchitos/Claude-Code-Game-Studios: Turn Claude Code into a full game dev studio — 49 AI agents, 72 workflow skills, and a complete coordination system mirroring real studio hierarchy.
anthropics/skills: Public repository for Agent Skills
EvoMap/evolver: The GEP-Powered Self-Evolution Engine for AI Agents. Genome Evolution Protocol. | evomap.ai
EvoMap - AI Self-Evolution Infrastructure
agentclientprotocol/agent-client-protocol: A protocol for connecting any editor to any agent
thunderbird/thunderbolt: AI You Control: Choose your models. Own your data. Eliminate vendor lock-in.
BasedHardware/omi: AI that sees your screen, listens to your conversations and tells you what to do
koala73/worldmonitor: Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface
Explore | alphaXiv
zilliztech/claude-context: Code search MCP for Claude Code. Make entire codebase the context for any coding agent.
langfuse/langfuse: 🪢 Open source LLM engineering platform: LLM Observability, metrics, evals, prompt management, playground, datasets. Integrates with OpenTelemetry, Langchain, OpenAI SDK, LiteLLM, and more. 🍊YC W23
bmad-code-org/BMAD-METHOD: Breakthrough Method for Agile Ai Driven Development
fabriqaai/specs.md: specs.md - ai-dlc spec driven development framework
leonvanzyl/agentic-coding-starter-kit
dontriskit/awesome-ai-system-prompts: 🧠 Curated collection of system prompts for top AI tools. Perfect for AI agent builders and prompt engineers. Incuding: ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Manus, Claude-Code, Loveable, v0, Grok, same new, windsurf, notion, and MetaAI.
virastack/nextjs-boilerplate: Production-ready Next.js 16+ starter template built with Tailwind CSS 4 and TypeScript.
virastack/ai-rules: AI-native architecture kit and high-discipline protocols for modern React applications.
Alishahryar1/free-claude-code: Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or via discord like openclaw
HKUDS/RAG-Anything: "RAG-Anything: All-in-One RAG Framework"
mksglu/context-mode: Context window optimization for AI coding agents. Sandboxes tool output, 98% reduction. 12 platforms
VoltAgent/awesome-agent-skills: A curated collection of 1000+ agent skills from official dev teams and the community, compatible with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and more.
coreyhaines31/marketingskills: Marketing skills for Claude Code and AI agents. CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering.
rohitg00/skillkit: Supercharge AI coding agents with portable skills. Install, translate & share skills across Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Copilot & 40 more
anthropics/claude-code: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.
AI Model & API Providers Analysis | Artificial Analysis
deepseek-ai/DeepEP: DeepEP: an efficient expert-parallel communication library
Anil-matcha/Open-Generative-AI: Uncensored, open-source alternative to Higgsfield AI, Freepik AI, Krea AI, Openart AI — Free, unrestricted AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models (Flux, Midjourney, Kling, Sora, Veo). No content filters. Self-hosted, MIT licensed.
trycua/cua: Open-source infrastructure for Computer-Use Agents. Sandboxes, SDKs, and benchmarks to train and evaluate AI agents that can control full desktops (macOS, Linux, Windows).
gastownhall/beads: Beads - A memory upgrade for your coding agent
apify/apify-mcp-server: The Apify MCP server enables your AI agents to extract data from social media, search engines, maps, e-commerce sites, or any other website using thousands of ready-made scrapers, crawlers, and automation tools available on the Apify Store.
modelcontextprotocol/servers: Model Context Protocol Servers
1jehuang/jcode: Coding Agent Harness
code-yeongyu/oh-my-openagent: omo; the best agent harness - previously oh-my-opencode
rtk-ai/rtk: CLI proxy that reduces LLM token consumption by 60-90% on common dev commands. Single Rust binary, zero dependencies
unclecode/crawl4ai: 🚀🤖 Crawl4AI: Open-source LLM Friendly Web Crawler & Scraper. Don't be shy, join here: https://discord.gg/jP8KfhDhyN
Th0rgal/sandboxed.sh: Self-hosted orchestrator for AI autonomous agents. Run Claude Code & Open Code in isolated linux workspaces. Manage your skills, configs and encrypted secrets with a git repo.
PriorLabs/TabPFN: ⚡ TabPFN: Foundation Model for Tabular Data ⚡
cocoindex-io/cocoindex: Incremental engine for long horizon agents 🌟 Star if you like it!
D4Vinci/Scrapling: 🕷️ An adaptive Web Scraping framework that handles everything from a single request to a full-scale crawl!
lobehub/lobehub: The ultimate space for work and life — to find, build, and collaborate with agent teammates that grow with you. We are taking agent harness to the next level — enabling multi-agent collaboration, effortless agent team design, and introducing agents as the unit of work interaction.
LearningCircuit/local-deep-research: ~95% on SimpleQA (e.g. Qwen3.6-27B on a 3090). Supports all local and cloud LLMs (llama.cpp, Ollama, Google, ...). 10+ search engines - arXiv, PubMed, your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.
awslabs/aidlc-workflows: AI-Driven Life Cycle (AI-DLC) adaptive workflow steering rules for AI coding agents
yzhao062/anywhere-agents: One config to rule all your AI agents: portable (every project, every session), effective (curated writing, routing, skills), and safer (destructive-command guard).
itlackey/akm: akm — Agent Kit Manager. A package manager for AI agent skills, commands, tools, and knowledge.
intellectronica/ruler: Ruler — apply the same rules to all coding agents
affaan-m/agentshield: AI agent security scanner. Detect vulnerabilities in agent configurations, MCP servers, and tool permissions. Available as CLI, GitHub Action, ECC plugin, and GitHub App integration. 🛡️
apache/tvm: Open Machine Learning Compiler Framework
stanfordnlp/dspy: DSPy: The framework for programming—not prompting—language models
zou-group/textgrad: TextGrad: Automatic ''Differentiation'' via Text -- using large language models to backpropagate textual gradients. Published in Nature.
can1357/oh-my-pi: ⌥ AI Coding agent for the terminal — hash-anchored edits, optimized tool harness, LSP, Python, browser, subagents, and more
Lum1104/Understand-Anything: Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.
colbymchenry/codegraph: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, OpenCode, AntiGravity, Kiro, and Hermes Agent — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local
chopratejas/headroom: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.
NVIDIA/cosmos: NVIDIA Cosmos is an open platform of world models, datasets, and tools that enables developers to build Physical AI for robots, autonomous vehicles, smart infrastructure, and more.
mvanhorn/last30days-skill: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary
PaddlePaddle/PaddleOCR: Turn any PDF or image document into structured data for your AI. A powerful, lightweight OCR toolkit that bridges the gap between images/PDFs and LLMs. Supports 100+ languages.
Panniantong/Agent-Reach: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
MemPalace/mempalace: The best-benchmarked open-source AI memory system. And it's free.
ag-ui-protocol/ag-ui: AG-UI: the Agent-User Interaction Protocol. Bring Agents into Frontend Applications.
RyanCodrai/turbovec: A vector index built on TurboQuant, written in Rust with Python bindings
santifer/career-ops: AI-powered job search system built on Claude Code. 14 skill modes, Go dashboard, PDF generation, batch processing.
maziyarpanahi/openmed: open-source healthcare ai
activeloopai/hivemind: One brain for all your agents
asreview/asreview: Active learning for systematic reviews
HKUDS/AI-Researcher: [NeurIPS2025] "AI-Researcher: Autonomous Scientific Innovation" -- A production-ready version: https://novix.science/chat
hexo-ai/sia: SIA is a Self Improving AI framework to autonomously improve the performance of any AI system (Model / Agent) on a benchmark task.
x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools: FULL Augment Code, Claude Code, Cluely, CodeBuddy, Comet, Cursor, Devin AI, Junie, Kiro, Leap.new, Lovable, Manus, NotionAI, Orchids.app, Perplexity, Poke, Qoder, Replit, Same.dev, Trae, Traycer AI, VSCode Agent, Warp.dev, Windsurf, Xcode, Z.ai Code, Dia & v0. (And other Open Sourced) System Prompts, Internal Tools & AI Models
0x11c11e/awesome-ai-research-tools: A curated list of AI tools specifically designed to assist in research activities, including tools for literature reviews, citation management, data analysis, and more. This repository is intended for researchers, students, and professionals who want to leverage AI to enhance their research workflows.
HKUDS/CLI-Anything: "CLI-Anything: Making ALL Software Agent-Native" -- CLI-Hub: https://clianything.cc/
HKUDS/ClawWork: "ClawWork: OpenClaw as Your AI Coworker - 💰 $15K earned in 11 Hours"
MervinPraison/PraisonAI: PraisonAI 🦞 — Hire a 24/7 AI Workforce. Stop writing boilerplate and start shipping autonomous self-improving agents that research, plan, code, and execute tasks. Deployed in 5 lines of code with built-in memory, RAG, and support for 100+ LLMs.
Muuuun/luxas: An autonomous research colleague — from a question to a compiled manuscript, while you sleep.
K-Dense-AI/scientific-agent-skills: Turn any AI agent into an AI Scientist. The #1 Agent Skills library for science, used by 160,000+ scientists worldwide. 140 ready-to-use skills plus 100+ scientific databases covering biology, chemistry, medicine, and drug discovery. Compatible with Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, Antigravity, and the open Agent Skills standard.
K-Dense-AI/k-dense-byok: An AI co-scientist powered by Scientific Agent Skills running on your desktop.
K-Dense-AI/science-superpowers: Composable computational-science methodology skills for AI research agents — pre-registration over TDD. A science-domain reimplementation of Superpowers.
K-Dense-AI/scientific-agents: Expert-thinking AGENTS.md profiles that teach AI agents to reason like senior scientists and engineers.
Orchestra-Research/AI-Research-SKILLs: Comprehensive open-source library of AI research and engineering skills for any AI model. Package the skills and your claude code/codex/gemini agent will be an AI research agent with full horsepower. Maintained by Orchestra Research.
openags/paper-search-mcp: MCP, CLI, Skills for searching and downloading academic papers from multiple sources like arXiv, PubMed, bioRxiv, etc.
vectorize-io/hindsight: Hindsight: Agent Memory That Learns
anthropics/claude-plugins-official: Official, Anthropic-managed directory of high quality Claude Code Plugins.
google-research/timesfm: TimesFM (Time Series Foundation Model) is a pretrained time-series foundation model developed by Google Research for time-series forecasting.
tashfeenahmed/freellmapi: OpenAI-compatible proxy that stacks the free tiers of 16 LLM providers (~1.7B tokens/month) behind one /v1 endpoint — plus any custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Smart routing, automatic failover, encrypted keys. Personal experimentation only.
Automated AI Red Teaming by Mozilla | 0din.ai
Tabstack - Web Data and Browser Automation APIs
